case_title: NICOLAS MENARD VS. SWIFT REALTY PARTNERS LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: CROSS COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100088067) FILED BY CROSS COMPLAINANT SWIFT REALTY PARTNERS LLC AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT ZOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 200007053) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MENARD, NICOLAS JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF NICOLAS MENARD'S MOTION TO COMPEL THE DEPOSITION OF DEFENDANT ABM INDUSTRY GROUPS LLCS EMPLOYEE JORGE TRINIDAD AND PERSON MOST QUALIFIED AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS. PLAINTIFF NICOLAS MENARD'S ("MENARD'S") MOTION TO COMPEL THE DEPOSITIONS OF DEFENDANT ABM INDUSTRY GROUPS, LLC'S EMPLOYEE JORGE TRINIDAD AND PERSON MOST QUALIFIED IS GRANTED. PREVAILING PARTY, MERNARD'S REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS DENIED. ALL OTHER SANCTIONS, IF ANY, ARE DENIED. MENARD SHALL PREPARE A FORM OF THE ORDER RECAPITULATING THIS RULING, AND SHALL SUBMIT A COPY OF THE PROPOSED ORDER TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM DROBBINS@TONGROBBINS.COM IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR FULL DETAILS) JUDGE PRO TEM: DOUGLAS ROBBINS, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-18-2021 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Defendant Abm Industry Groups Llcs Employee Jorge Trinidad And Person Most Qualified And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-22-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF NICOLAS MENARD's Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Defendant Abm Industry Groups Llcs Employee Jorge Trinidad And Person Most Qualified And Request For Sanctions.

Plaintiff Nicolas Menard's ("Menard's") Motion to Compel the Depositions of Defendant ABM Industry Groups, LLC's Employee Jorge Trinidad and Person Most Qualified is GRANTED. Prevailing party, Mernard's request for monetary sanctions is DENIED. All other sanctions, if any, are DENIED. Menard shall prepare a form of the order recapitulating this ruling, and shall submit a copy of the proposed order to the Judge Pro Tem drobbins@tongrobbins.com in compliance with CRC 3.1312. (see word minutes for full details)

Judge Pro Tem: Douglas Robbins, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Defendant Abm Industry Groups Llcs Employee Jorge Trinidad And Person Most Qualified And Request For Sanctions
